message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor Actor
participant "CatERingAppManager.eventManager:EventManager" as EventManager
participant "eventManager.currentEvent:Event" as Event
participant "r:EventReceiver" as Receiver

activate EventManager

alt [currentEvent == null]
  EventManager -> Actor : Throw UseCaseLogicException
else
  EventManager -> Event : setName(name)
  Event -> Event : activate
  Event -> Event : deactivate
  EventManager -> Event : setDate(date)
  Event -> Event : activate
  Event -> Event : deactivate
  EventManager -> Event : setLocation(location)
  Event -> Event : activate
  Event -> Event : deactivate
  EventManager -> Event : setNumberOfParticipants(numberOfParticipants)
  Event -> Event : activate
  Event -> Event : deactivate
  EventManager -> Event : setServiceType(serviceType)
  Event -> Event : activate
  Event -> Event : deactivate
  EventManager -> Event : setTipologyNote(tipologyNote)
  Event -> Event : activate
  Event -> Event : deactivate

  loop for each r in receivers
    EventManager -> Receiver : notifyDataAssigned(currentEvent)
    Receiver -> Receiver : activate
    Receiver -> Receiver : deactivate
  end
end

EventManager -> Actor : return
deactivate EventManager
@enduml
